name: Cannot pay more than the Gift card Balance

steps.name: Given I am on the HOME page
When I clock in the timesheet with PIN "4040"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('4', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('0', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('4', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('0', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
Then I should see the employee "Aubrey" in the employee list
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the "Manicure" service
When I add the "Manicure" service to my cart
Then I should see my cart showing 1 item added
When I click on the total price of "Manicure"
And I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the text "PAYMENT TICKET" visible
When I select the "Gift" payment type
Then I should see the "ID GIFT CARD" name
When I fill the Gift card with "2020"
And I click on the "CHECK BALANCE" button
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'CHECK BALANCE', exact: true })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'CHECK BALANCE', exact: true })
And I click on the element with id "payment"
And I wait for the page fully loaded
And I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should see the toast message "Gift Card #2020 does not have enough funds to pay" visible
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.MuiAlert-message').filter({ hasText: 'Gift Card #2020 does not have enough funds to pay' })
When I select the "Cash" payment type
And I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should see a popup dialog with content "CHANGE$0.00OK"
When I click on the "OK" button in the popup dialog
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
When I navigate to "Tickets" on the navigation bar
And I wait for the page fully loaded
And I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see the first ticket of payment "$35.70"
When I reopen to void ticket with payment amount "$35.70"

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$35.70' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Expect "toContainText" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$35.70' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Click locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$35.70' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'VOID TICKET', exact: true })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'VOID TICKET', exact: true })

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'SELECT VOID REASON' }) }).or(locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'VOID TICKET' }) }))
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'SELECT VOID REASON' }) }).getByText('System Test', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#draggable-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: /confirm void/i }) }).last().getByRole('button', { name: /confirm/i })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#draggable-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: /confirm void/i }) }).last().getByRole('button', { name: /confirm/i })
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
When I delete ticket after void it with payment amount "35.7"
And I clock out the timesheet with PIN "4040"
